vp_spk_a.label: spk_a_from_kokoro_bf_emma
vp_spk_a.prompt_text: You are a helpful assistant.<|endofprompt|>Good morning, and welcome to City Library. How can I help you today? I can help with membership, borrowing books, or finding a study desk.
vp_spk_a.ref_line: Good morning, and welcome to City Library. How can I help you today? I can help with membership, borrowing books, or finding a study desk.
vp_spk_a.default_instruct: You are a helpful assistant. Speak clearly and calmly in English.<|endofprompt|>

vp_spk_b.label: spk_b_from_kokoro_bm_george
vp_spk_b.prompt_text: You are a helpful assistant.<|endofprompt|>Hello. I'd like to join the library, please. I have just moved to the area and I need a membership card so I can borrow books and use the computers.
vp_spk_b.ref_line: Hello. I'd like to join the library, please. I have just moved to the area and I need a membership card so I can borrow books and use the computers.
vp_spk_b.default_instruct: You are a helpful assistant. Speak clearly and calmly in English.<|endofprompt|>

tense_instruct: You are a helpful assistant. Speak slightly faster, more urgent and tense.<|endofprompt|>
